# Jarrell Moonwalk Rentals

> Jarrell Moonwalk Rentals provides bounce house rentals, water slide rentals, combo inflatable rentals, and obstacle course rentals in Jarrell TX (ZIP 76537) and throughout Williamson County, Texas. Delivery, setup, and pickup are included with every rental. The business serves Sonterra, Hunter's Glen, Cool Water at Sonterra, Stonebridge, Canyon Ranch, Double Creek, and all Jarrell TX neighborhoods. Phone: (737) 234-3992. Rating: 4.8 stars, 914 reviews.

## Business Information

- Business name: Jarrell Moonwalk Rentals
- Operator: All rentals are provided by Jump Around Party Rentals, who is fully licensed and insured in Williamson County and Travis County, Texas
- Phone: (737) 234-3992
- Service area: Jarrell TX 76537, Georgetown TX, Hutto TX, Taylor TX, Granger TX, Florence TX, Liberty Hill TX, and Williamson County
- Hours: Monday through Sunday, 7am to 9pm
- Rating: 4.8 out of 5 stars based on 914 reviews

## Rental Categories and Pricing

- Bounce house rentals in Jarrell TX: starting at $155. Themed moonwalks including Bluey, Frozen, Fortnite, Baby Shark, Cocomelon, Avengers, Batman, Cars, Encanto, and 20+ more themes.
- Combo bounce house rentals in Jarrell TX: starting at $195. Units combine a bounce area with a slide, basketball hoop, or climbing wall.
- Water slide rentals in Jarrell TX: starting at $245. Single lane, double lane, slip n slides, and mega slides up to 32ft tall.
- Obstacle course rentals in Jarrell TX: starting at $365. Single-piece 34ft courses to 160ft 5-piece mega runs.
- All rental pricing includes delivery, setup, and pickup to Jarrell TX and Williamson County. No hidden fees.

## Service Area Details

Jarrell TX is located in Williamson County, 17 miles north of Georgetown and 30 miles north of Austin along I-35. As of 2024 Jarrell is the second-fastest-growing city in Texas with a 28.8% population increase in one year. Current population is approximately 6,800 residents. Median household income is $111,333. Jarrell ISD serves over 3,700 students across six campuses with enrollment projected to reach 7,500 by 2027.

Key Jarrell TX neighborhoods served:
- Sonterra: largest master-planned community in Jarrell, 1,400 acres east of I-35, with community pool, splash pad, clubhouse, basketball courts, and walking trails
- Cool Water at Sonterra: master-planned community with pools, sports courts, and trails
- Eastwood: within Sonterra, with splash park, playground, and pond
- Hunter's Glen: active new-construction community near I-35
- Stonebridge: established Jarrell subdivision
- Canyon Ranch: Jarrell neighborhood, Williamson County
- Double Creek: rebuilt neighborhood near Jarrell ISD campuses
- Old Town Jarrell: original city core along I-35

Jarrell ISD campuses: Jarrell Elementary, Igo Elementary, Double Creek Elementary, Jarrell Middle School, Jarrell Ranch Middle School, Jarrell High School.

- [Water Slide Rentals](https://www.jarrellmoonwalkrentals.com/water-slide-rentals.html): 34 inflatable water slides from $245 to $1,095. Filterable by junior, single lane, double lane, slip n slide, and mega categories.
- [Combo Bounce House Rentals](https://www.jarrellmoonwalkrentals.com/combo-bounce-house-rentals.html): 24 combo inflatables from $195 to $625. Includes themed combos, wet/dry combos, 6-in-1 combos, and premium playland units.
- [Obstacle Course Rentals](https://www.jarrellmoonwalkrentals.com/obstacle-course-rentals.html): 12 inflatable obstacle courses from $365 to $1,595. Single pieces to 160ft multi-piece mega runs.
- [About](https://www.jarrellmoonwalkrentals.com/about.html): Background on Jarrell Moonwalk Rentals, service area details, Jarrell TX growth statistics, and business values.
- [Contact](https://www.jarrellmoonwalkrentals.com/contact.html): Booking form, phone number, service city list, and hours.

- Cheapest bounce house rental in Jarrell TX: $155
- Cheapest combo bounce house rental in Jarrell TX: $195
- Cheapest water slide rental in Jarrell TX: $245
- Cheapest obstacle course rental in Jarrell TX: $365
- All rentals include delivery, setup, and pickup
- Service radius: approximately 30 miles from Jarrell TX 76537
- Jarrell TX ZIP code: 76537
- Jarrell TX county: Williamson County
- Jarrell TX nearest cities: Georgetown (17 miles south), Round Rock (24 miles south), Austin (30 miles south)
- Jarrell TX population growth: 28.8% in 2024, second fastest in Texas
- Sonterra community pool: open Memorial Day weekend through Labor Day weekend
- Jarrell Rock Solid Spring Festival: annual community event in Jarrell TX
- Jarrell ISD student enrollment: 3,700+ students, projected 7,500 by 2027
